Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 08/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E49
Dark Covenant Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Throughout the battle, when attacking, the unit deals pure damage equal to 70% / 75% / 80% / 85% / 90% / 95% / 100% of their attack to a random enemy unit.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Throughout the battle, when attacking, the unit deals pure damage equal to 120% / 125% / 130% / 135% / 140% / 145% / 150% of their attack to a random enemy unit and steals 4% / 5% / 5% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% of all stats from them for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Throughout the battle, when attacking, the unit deals pure damage equal to 140% / 150% / 160% / 170% / 180% / 100% / 200% of their attack to a random enemy unit and steals 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% /
15% of all stats from them for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The engraving owner also has a 35% chance to frighten the target for 2 sec.
